name: Lumen Thief Corridors
description: The Lumen Thief's inner corridors hum with patched conduit, tired air scrubbers, and the private math of a crew learning to move together.

actions.label: Check the corridor status board
actions.examine_text: The board lists repairs, watch shifts, and three different handwriting styles arguing about whether the galley light is haunted or merely badly wired.
